mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(folder_code), 0) + 1 FROM documents_folders
INSERT INTO documents_folders ( project_code, folder_code, folder_name, created_on, header_folder_code, user_code ) VALUES ( #{projectCode}, #{folderCode}, #{folderName}, #{createdOn},
#{headerFolderCode}
NULL
, #{userCode} )

SELECT NVL(MAX(file_code),0)+1 FROM documents_attachments
INSERT INTO documents_attachments ( file_code, original_name, stored_name, path, mime_type, size_bytes, uploaded_at, user_code, folder_code, project_code ) VALUES ( #{fileCode}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{path}, #{mimeType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{uploadedAt}, #{userCode}, #{folderCode}, #{projectCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT file_code, original_name, stored_name, path, mime_type, size_bytes FROM documents_attachments WHERE file_code = #{fileCode}

SELECT da.file_code, da.original_name, da.stored_name, da.path, da.mime_type, da.size_bytes, fh.folder_path FROM documents_attachments da JOIN AUTH_PROJECT ap ON da.project_code = ap.project_code LEFT JOIN users u ON da.user_code = u.user_code LEFT JOIN FOLDER_TREE ft ON da.folder_code = ft.folder_code
WHERE 1=1
AND LOWER(da.original_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{originalName}) || '%'
AND da.user_code = #{createdCode}
AND da.folder_code = #{folderCode}
AND da.uploaded_at >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND da.uploaded_at <= TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents_attachments WHERE folder_code IN ( SELECT folder_code FROM documents_folders START WITH folder_code = #{folderCode} CONNECT BY PRIOR folder_code = header_folder_code )
